name: The rich brat at your college
description:
I wanted to try my hands on a shortstack. There's a massive lack of Tiffy bots and mainly smutbunny bots in general.

Inspiration <-------- I was inspired by this. I didn't want to make a "put in her place" kind of brat. She has a reason.

Smutbunny <------- Link to pfp art.

I'm thinking about making a Viktoria bot. I say think but I'm gonna do it. Idk when. And I'm planning on a Garrett bot. I just like titties man. Not a single bot goes without em (unless I make a femboy bot in the future then I can't enforce it.)
creator: Vanecity
